case_title: MARK YIU KONG CHENG VS. OUTFRONT MEDIA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-23-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-28-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-04-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, MARK YIU KONG AS TO DEFENDANT OUTFRONT MEDIA, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-23-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-19-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-31-2016
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17053069)
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17053069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, MARK YIU KONG
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-28-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17053069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, MARK YIU KONG

PROOF OF SERVICE (NO SERVICE OF PROCESS IN THIS CASE BECASUE THE ENTIRE CASE SETTLED PRIOR TO SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT- NO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS WAS NAMED/INVOLVED. NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT AND REQUEST FOR DISMISS FILED CONCURRENTLY.) (TRANSACTION ID # 17053069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHENG, MARK YIU KONG
